game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Match Game is a physics-based puzzle where players strategically drop various fruits into a container, aiming to merge identical fruits upon collision to create progressively larger ones. The central mechanic involves careful placement using left/right swipes and drops, as two matching fruits combine into the next fruit in a predetermined sequence, culminating in a giant watermelon. The game's primary rule dictates that if fruits spill over the container's top edge, the game ends, emphasizing spatial management and foresight. Progression is measured by achieving high scores through successful merges and the ultimate challenge of creating the largest watermelon, rather than distinct levels. Controls are simple swipe-and-drop gestures. Monetization, while not explicitly detailed, typically involves rewarded video ads for retries or power-ups, and optional in-app purchases for ad removal or cosmetic enhancements.
game_info.description: Drop and merge identical fruits to create bigger ones! Start with cherries and work your way up to the ultimate watermelon. Carefully position each fruit before dropping it into the container. When two matching fruits touch, they combine into the next fruit in the sequence. Keep all fruits below the danger line at the top - if any fruit crosses it for too long, it's game over! Score points with every merge and aim for the highest score possible.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/A: Move fruit left
Arrow Right/D: Move fruit right
Arrow Down/S: Drop fruit faster
SPACE: Quick drop fruit
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause game
R: Restart (from game over screen)
